text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – bow each attacking character.
flavorText: Where none survive to cremate the fallen, rot and corruption reign.
name: Flooded Waste

text: This province gets +2 strength while you have a Water role. Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose a defending character – move that character home.
name: Seeking the Truth

text: Interrupt: When you would lose 1 honor for an unopposed conflict – cancel that honor loss. Then, lose 1 fate. (Unlimited.) Errata from RRG v1.7
flavorText: "The art is in the flowers chosen, not merely their position."
name: Ikebana Artisan

text: No attachments except Weapon. While the [element-fire] ring is unclaimed, this character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political].
name: Volcanic Troll

text: This character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts in which it lost.
flavorText: "The spirits cannot rest, so why should I?"
name: Tireless Sōdan Senzo

text: Interrupt: When you would resolve the [element-water] ring – instead of the normal ring effect, you may choose and bow any character and you may choose and ready a different character.
name: Asako Azunami

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – each player adds the bid on his or her honor dial to his or her skill during this conflict's resolution.
flavorText: Her face might be bare, but she was never without a mask.
name: Disguised Protector

text: Limit 1 per deck. You may play cards in adjacent provinces as if they were in your hand. Action: During a conflict – turn a card in an adjacent province faceup.
name: Hidden Moon Dōjō

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character you control and a character in your home – switch the chosen characters' location.
flavorText: "When I call upon you, you will answer!"
name: Master of the Swift Waves

text: This character gets +X[conflict-military] and +X[conflict-political]. X is equal to the number of fate in your fate pool.
flavorText: "Simply saying it does not make it so."
name: Yoritomo

text: Immune to Shadowlands and Mahō card effects. Reaction: After this character enters play during a conflict – until the end of the conflict, raise or lower the strength of the attacked province by 1 (to a minimum of 1). (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Nezumi Infiltrator

text: Water role only. Action: While you are the defending player, choose a bowed character you control – ready that character and move it to the conflict.
flavorText: "If wse rest, the entire Empire falls."
name: Fight On

text: Action: While this character is participating in a [conflict-military] conflict – until the end of the conflict, each participating character your opponent controls with equal or lower [conflict-military] skill than this character cannot trigger their abilities.
name: Menacing Iron Warrior

text: Air role only. Action: Choose a character you control – honor that character. Then, honor it again.
name: Soul Beyond Reproach

text: Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains Tattooed. Reaction: After you play this attachment during a conflict – move attached character to the conflict. If attached character is a Monk, you may take another action after this one. Errata from RRG v1.6
name: Hawk Tattoo

text: Action: If you have 2 or more rings in your claimed ring pool – ready attached character.
flavorText: So long as he never lost his feet, he would never stop fighting.
name: Heroic Resolve

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Shugenja character you control and a character in your dynasty discard pile – until the end of the conflict, set the participating character's base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill equal to the printed [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill of the other character.
name: My Ancestor's Strength

text: Ancestral. Restricted. Attach to a unique [clan-phoenix] character you control. If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character – move that character home. It cannot participate as an attacker this phase."
name: Ofushikai

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character you control. Your opponent selects one – that character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict, or your opponent gives you 1 honor.
name: Deceptive Offer

text: Attach to a Shugenja character you control. Action: During a conflict – put each facedown card in your provinces into play facedown in the conflict as 1[conflict-military], -[conflict-political], 0 glory characters with the Cavalry and Spirit traits. Discard those characters at the end of the conflict.
name: Force of the River
